register: WEO Methodology Errata Register — V1.5 publications
note: Corrections to expression, not changes to methodology. The Manual's substantive provisions govern throughout.

errata.section: §9.8.1 Connection Type Quick Reference — Decision Tree
errata.summary: The Policy Cascade / Regulatory Enablement branch is rebuilt to the §9.2.1 language-character test, and the unconditional "(CC-V)" labels are replaced with a documentary-character confidence note (CC-V / CC-E).

errata.nature: Internal inconsistency across the publication pair (V1.5 conversion omission)
errata.summary: The Decision Rules block is replaced with the V1.5 Manual §9.2.1 rules, the "≥2 AL Threshold Rationale" is recast as the Language-Character Rationale, and 根据 is removed from the mandatory-marker list with a context-dependency note added.
The 根据 marker row is remapped from "Policy Cascade" to context-dependent between Policy Cascade and Regulatory Enablement (Manual §9.2.1 Note).
The superseded "from at least two distinct ecosystems" construction is corrected to "of each of at least two distinct ecosystems" at all three lines.
The same T1 "from" → "of each of" fix: the sentence is recast to "requiring engagement by the principal AI actor of each of at least two distinct ecosystems".

errata.nature: V1.5 conversion escape (neutral-WER reframe not propagated)
errata.summary: The stale ~10:1 governance-gap figure is replaced with the neutral corpus-ratio (Warmth Engine Ratio) expression, and two zero-baseline reassessment triggers are rebased to the Manual §8.5 provisionality threshold (ENT-5 count below 10).

errata.nature: V1.5 conversion escape (PPA floor not propagated)
errata.summary: The below-100MW claim is corrected: a grid impact assessment qualifies below 100MW, while the power purchase agreement route carries its own ≥100MW dedicated-capacity floor (Manual §8.3.1).
The evidence standard is corrected from a single disjunct to "2+ primary, or 1 primary + 2 corroborating".

errata.nature: V1.5 conversion escape (Criterion 1 gate not reflected)
errata.summary: The Type 1 cell is expanded to the three evidence routes (citation, directive, or documented implementation), and the Type 7 cell notes the mandatory Criterion 1 mechanism gate.
The Type-7-only framing is corrected to the all-seven-CC-types scope limitation, with the cross-reference fixed to Manual §9.1.8.

errata.nature: V1.5 conversion escape (aspirational form not propagated)
errata.summary: The declarative financial-indices claim is corrected to the aspirational form: WEO "aims to meet" the verification rigour of major financial indices.
A "Corporate Product Release Scope Limitation" index row is added (Manual §9.1.8 / Rationale §9.5.1).

errata.nature: Framing lag (contradicts Rule 1 in the same section)
errata.summary: The Decision Principle is recast to language-primacy with Authority Levels in the supporting role, and the trailing "when distinguishing…" clause is dropped.
The Corporate gloss is corrected to "Private-sector entity action (unilateral or coordinated): disclosures, partnerships, market structure events".
The uniform 6-month presupposition is qualified: "6 months; 60 days for verified product releases under §3.9.2".
The universal confidence-levels claim is corrected: Category Creator and Standard Practice components carry no confidence band by convention (§2.2).
The DOI 10.1111/psj.12406 is appended to the third Mallinson (2021) citation, matching the two sibling instances.
